who: HR admins in tech startups managing equity compensation for 10-50 employees
offer: For HR admins in tech startups processing 10-50 employees, manual tracking of equity compensation causes missed milestones. We provide automated vesting schedule calculations instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking vesting schedules and capital gains for equity compensation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR admins seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on equity compensation tools
DM outreach to HR admins with demo video links
Engage in community forums discussing HR tools
try_it: Let users try Vesting schedule calculator and Milestone alert system for HR admins on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
